attributes.description: Detect running AI coding agent processes on Windows. Use for shadow AI triage — identifies Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, GitHub Copilot, Aider, Codeium, Amazon Q, Tabnine, Goose, Devin, and other AI-assisted development tools running as Windows processes.
attributes.query:
SELECT
    p.name,
    p.path,
    p.cmdline,
    p.pid,
    u.username,
    p.resident_size,
    datetime(p.start_time, 'unixepoch') AS start_time,
    p.parent AS ppid
FROM processes p
LEFT JOIN users u ON p.uid = u.uid
WHERE p.name IN (
    'claude', 'claude.exe', 'cursor', 'cursor.exe',
    'windsurf', 'windsurf.exe', 'warp', 'warp.exe',
    'zed', 'zed.exe', 'tabnine', 'tabnine.exe',
    'TabNine', 'TabNine.exe', 'WasmTabNine', 'WasmTabNine.exe',
    'codeium_language_server', 'codeium_language_server.exe',
    'supermaven', 'supermaven.exe',
    'amazon-q', 'amazon-q.exe', 'pieces-os', 'pieces-os.exe',
    'Pieces OS', 'Pieces OS.exe',
    'codex', 'codex.exe', 'aider', 'aider.exe',
    'sgpt', 'sgpt.exe'
,
    'augment',
    'augment.exe',
    'codex',
    'codex.exe',
    'goose',
    'goose.exe',
    'devin',
    'devin.exe',
    'amp',
    'amp.exe',
    'gemini-cli', 'gemini-cli.exe', 'genaiscript', 'genaiscript.exe', 'openai', 'openai.exe', 'llm', 'llm.exe', 'bolt', 'bolt.exe', 'replit', 'replit.exe', 'ghostwriter', 'ghostwriter.exe', 'bito', 'bito.exe')
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%claude-code%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%@anthropic/claude-code%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%@anthropic-ai/claude-code%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%claude_desktop%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%com.anthropic.claudedesktop%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%Cursor.app%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%Cursor Helper%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%cursor-retrieval%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%Windsurf%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%codeium_language_server%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%codeium%enterprise%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%github.copilot%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%copilot-agent%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%copilot-language-server%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%@openai/codex%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%aider-chat%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%aider%--model%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%saoudrizwan.claude-dev%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%rooveterinaryinc.roo-cline%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%continue.continue%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%continuedev%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%amazon-q%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%codewhisperer%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%AmazonWebServices.amazon-q%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%sourcegraph.cody%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%tabnine%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%dev.warp.Warp%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%dev.zed.Zed%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%shell_gpt%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%shell-gpt%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%openhands%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%swe-agent%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%pieces-os%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%supermaven%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%augment%code%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%openai/codex%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%goose%session%'

    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%openclaw%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%moltbot%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%clawdbot%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%autogpt%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%auto-gpt%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%babyagi%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%agentgpt%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%crewai%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%semantic-kernel%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%semantic_kernel%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%llama-index%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%llama_index%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%haystack%pipeline%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%cohere%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%mistralai%'
;
